ReadRange.note: Self-closing tag. Classic Workbook activity — no Excel app needed.
ReadRange.description: Read Range activity from the integrations category.
ReadRange.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Read Range.

WriteRange.description: Write Range activity from the integrations category.
WriteRange.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Write Range.

WriteCell.description: Write Cell activity from the integrations category.
WriteCell.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Write Cell.

AppendRange.description: Append Range activity from the integrations category.
AppendRange.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Append Range.

ReadPDFText.description: Read PDF Text activity from the integrations category.
ReadPDFText.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Read PDF Text.

ReadPDFWithOCR.OCREngine.content: ActivityFunc x:TypeArguments='sd:Image, scg:IEnumerable(scg:KeyValuePair(sd1:Rectangle, x:String))' with DelegateInArgument and GoogleOCR (Tesseract) element

ReadPDFWithOCR.description: Read PDF With OCR activity from the integrations category.
ReadPDFWithOCR.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Read PDF With OCR.

SendMail.ConnectionDetailsBackupSlot.content: BackupSlot x:TypeArguments='umae:ConnectionDetails' with IntegrationService and LegacyConfiguration lists

SendMail.description: Send Mail activity from the integrations category.
SendMail.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Send Mail.

GetIMAPMailMessages.description: Get IMAP Mail Messages activity from the integrations category.
GetIMAPMailMessages.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Get IMAP Mail Messages.

SaveMailAttachments.description: Save Mail Attachments activity from the integrations category.
SaveMailAttachments.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Save Mail Attachments.

DatabaseConnect.description: Database Connect activity from the integrations category.
DatabaseConnect.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Database Connect.

ExecuteQuery.Parameters.content: scg:Dictionary x:TypeArguments='x:String, p:Argument' with InArgument elements (only when parameters provided)

ExecuteQuery.description: Execute Query activity from the integrations category.
ExecuteQuery.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Execute Query.

ExecuteNonQuery.Parameters.content: scg:Dictionary x:TypeArguments='x:String, p:Argument' with InArgument elements (only when parameters provided)

ExecuteNonQuery.description: Execute Non Query activity from the integrations category.
ExecuteNonQuery.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Execute Non Query.

BulkInsert.note: Requires prior DatabaseConnect whose DatabaseConnection output is passed as db_connection_variable. TableName is a literal column-matched table. DataTable must match the target schema. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
BulkInsert.description: Bulk Insert activity from the integrations category.
BulkInsert.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Bulk Insert.

BulkUpdate.note: Requires prior DatabaseConnect whose DatabaseConnection output is passed as db_connection_variable. TableName is a literal column-matched table. DataTable must match the target schema. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
BulkUpdate.description: Bulk Update activity from the integrations category.
BulkUpdate.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Bulk Update.

InsertDataTable.note: Requires prior DatabaseConnect whose DatabaseConnection output is passed as db_connection_variable. TableName is a literal column-matched table. DataTable must match the target schema. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
InsertDataTable.description: Insert Data Table activity from the integrations category.
InsertDataTable.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Insert Data Table.

db_connection_variable.note: DatabaseConnection output from the matching DatabaseConnect

DatabaseDisconnect.note: Self-closing. Pair with a preceding DatabaseConnect. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
DatabaseDisconnect.description: Database Disconnect activity from the integrations category.
DatabaseDisconnect.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Database Disconnect.

DatabaseTransaction.note: Wraps statements in a transaction. Body must contain the DB activities to execute transactionally. Generator emits empty Sequence placeholder — caller must inject body activities. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
DatabaseTransaction.description: Database Transaction activity from the integrations category.
DatabaseTransaction.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Database Transaction.

page_number_variable.note: Int32 variable or literal bracketed: e.g. [1]

ExportPDFPageAsImage.note: Namespace upap: = clr-namespace:UiPath.PDF.Activities.PDF;assembly=UiPath.PDF.Activities. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
ExportPDFPageAsImage.description: Export PDF Page As Image activity from the integrations category.
ExportPDFPageAsImage.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Export PDF Page As Image.

ExtractImagesFromPDF.description: Extract Images From PDF activity from the integrations category.
ExtractImagesFromPDF.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Extract Images From PDF.

ExtractPDFPageRange.description: Extract PDF Page Range activity from the integrations category.
ExtractPDFPageRange.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Extract PDF Page Range.

GetPDFPageCount.description: Get PDF Page Count activity from the integrations category.
GetPDFPageCount.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Get PDF Page Count.

JoinPDF.description: Join PDF activity from the integrations category.
JoinPDF.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Join PDF.

password_variable.note: Current password (needed when opening a protected PDF)

owner_password_variable.note: New owner password (set to apply protection; empty to remove)

ManagePDFPassword.note: Password and OwnerPassword are surfaced in the Studio properties panel but omitted from the default XAML skeleton. Review required. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
ManagePDFPassword.description: Manage PDF Password activity from the integrations category.
ManagePDFPassword.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Manage PDF Password.

ReadXPSText.note: XPS analog to ReadPDFText. Same namespace prefix (ui:). (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
ReadXPSText.description: Read XPS Text activity from the integrations category.
ReadXPSText.use_when: User wants to integrate with an external system using Read XPS Text.

ReadXPSWithOCR.note: ReadXPSWithOCR requires an OCREngine ActivityFunc delegate (same shape as ReadPDFWithOCR). Emit via hand-written generator (see gen_read_pdf_with_ocr in integrations.py) rather than data-driven fallback. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
ReadXPSWithOCR.description: Read XPS With OCR (wizard-only) — must be configured through UiPath Studio's interactive wizard.
ReadXPSWithOCR.use_when: Do not auto-generate Read XPS With OCR. Direct the user to author it in UiPath Studio.
